content: Patient has history of hypertension and stable angina. ECG showed normal sinus rhythm. Prescribed Lisinopril 10mg daily.
Routine dental cleaning, no caries. Recommended fluoride treatment.
Patient underwent stress test, positive for ischemia. Referred for cardiac catheterization.
Left ankle sprain, advised rest and ice. No fracture.
Emergency visit for chest pain, troponin elevated, diagnosed with NSTEMI. Stent placed in LAD.
